title: Shadow of the Guillotine
writer: Jean Delannoy, Philippe Erlanger, Bernard Zimmer
actors: Michèle Morgan, Richard Todd, Jacques Morel
plot: While Louis XV is dying, the Dauphine of France, Marie-Antoinette, seduces a Swedish officer, Axel de Fersen, which pains her husband, the new King Louis XVI, who will know how to be generous when he learns of this deception.
